title: Research Protocol for Public Sector Digital Transformation and  Sustainability: conceptual research papers
author: Lember, Veiko
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This Research Protocol for Public Sector Digital Transformation and  Sustainability outlines the framework, research inquiries, and methodological strategies that shall guide both collective and individual research activities, including co-supervised PhD projects. To ensure widespread  acceptance and comprehension, the protocol has been presented at the 45th annual Conference of the European Group for Public Administration (EGPA’23).
steps_raw: This Research Protocol for Public Sector Digital Transformation and  Sustainability outlines the framework, research inquiries, and methodological strategies that shall guide both collective and individual research activities, including co-supervised PhD projects. To ensure widespread  acceptance and comprehension, the protocol has been presented at the 45th annual Conference of the European Group for Public Administration (EGPA’23).
